form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of 11 weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation third of 14 at Chantilly All Weather January 21 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Hayejohn carrying 59.5kg at $8.30. When resuming last campaign seventh of 14 at Chantilly All Weather November 19 2024 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Gualda with 54.5kg at $6.20. Looks a key runner.
